AFFECT [[14057140791097851954]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[7713268673447380]]
	REPLACE [[214642559243]] WITH {
		~&214642559243&~: ~&214634455770&~.~&6504095402&~.replace(/^\~&180973&~+~&180968&~/, "").replace(/~&180968&~/,~&"180905&~)
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[13817727852014686524]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[9890570644836023905]]
	REBUILD [[254480451320573660.495334332051582499]]
	LOCATE BEFORE STREAM | ~&7713147276314174&~.~&214642559243&~ = ~&5971598&~.~&233722493197252&~(() => ~&214634455770&~?.~&6504095402&~ ?? ""); |
	REMOVE LOCATED
	INSERT STREAM | 
	~&7713147276314174&~.~&214642559243&~ = ~&5971598&~.~&233722493197252&~(() => ~&214634455770&~?.~&6504095402&~.replace(/^\~&180973&~+~&180968&~/, "").replace(/~&180968&~/,~&"180905&~) ?? ""); |
	END REBUILD
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
